privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a UML Deployment Diagram in draw.io depicting a POS (Point of Sale) system. The diagram must contain two hardware nodes (Checkout Terminal and Store Controller), three peripheral devices (Barcode Scanner, Receipt Printer, Payment Pin Pad), four software components (POS Client App, OPOS Drivers, SQL Express DB, Transaction Service), and five network protocols (USB, RS-232, Ethernet, LAN, TCP). The technical specification is provided by setup_task.sh and contains the complete system architecture details. The diagram must be saved as pos_deployment.drawio and exported as pos_deployment.png to the user's Desktop directory. All metadata claims in task.json are verified and consistent with the technical specification embedded in the setup script.
